parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ crmUsername: 'YOUR_CRM_USERNAME', crmPassword: 'YOUR_CRM_PASSWORD', scrapeDate: (() => { const d = new Date(); const day = d.getDay(); if (day === 0) d.setDate(d.getDate() - 2); else if (day === 6) d.setDate(d.getDate() - 1); return d.toISOString().slice(0,10); })() }) }}
